reasonsForNoActivities.fr: Autres (précisez dans le champ des commentaires)

p2Plan.noActivitiesComment: NSPI is fully compliant with regulations for emissions and management of materials related to its operations. In producing safe and reliable electricity at the lowest cost for Nova Scotians, NSPI considers efficiency of operations among other factors in achieving sustainable business solutions.
